title: Glowstone Dust Color Fix
description: A simple resource pack that changes the Glowstone dust color to make it easier to distinguish from Glowstone Dust and prevent confusion with Totems.
body:
Are you accidentally swapping your crucial Totem for a handful of Glowstone Dust?

This Resource Pack specifically targets the visual clutter issue in your inventory!

Glowstone Dust and the Totem of Undying are both small, bright yellow/gold items. This often leads to frustrating and dangerous mix-ups during intense combat or quick inventory management.

> What this pack does:

- The Glowstone Dust item texture is re-colored to a dark, muted black/dark gray.

- It creates a clear and immediate visual distinction between a common brewing ingredient (the Dust) and a life-saving item (the Totem).
